title: ALL PROJECTS ON A CALENDAR VIEW, and export to iCal
excerpt:
Hello everyone, 
I’m looking a way to see al my projects grouped on a calendar view, and the possibility of exporting them on iCal. How can I do? 
thanks for helping me out on this! 
Andrea

posts.author: digitalarea (Andrea)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,
I’m looking a way to see al my projects grouped on a calendar view, and the possibility of exporting them on iCal. How can I do?

thanks for helping me out on this!

Andrea

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @digitalarea

Welcome to the community! The native calendar integrations support outlook and google cal, but not yet iCal. You could potentially get a sync set up using something like Zapier or make.com, or look to sync the iCal with a connected outlook/gmail calendar to feed it through.

Feel free to reach out if you wanted to chat some options through:

peta@upstreamtech.io
+61 3 9067 5611

posts.author: digitalarea (Andrea)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Peta!
And this is the part of the integration with iCal, thanks!
Can you help me for the Monday part as well? How can I see all my projects in a single calendar view, inside Monday?

Warm regards
Ciao!
Andrea
